name: win64c-fallback-critical-section-and-locale-resolver

findings.summary: The zero-index guard enter wrapper initializes the locale API resolver before entering fallback critical section 0x140C56870.
evidence: 0x1407D3714 calls 0x1407DC3E8, loads RCX with 0x140C56870, then tail-jumps through 0x140802480.
The import slot 0x140802480 resolves to KERNEL32.dll!EnterCriticalSection.
0x1407D3730 is the paired leave thunk: it loads RCX with 0x140C56870 and tail-jumps through KERNEL32.dll!LeaveCriticalSection at 0x140802478.

findings.summary: Bootstraps a table of locale/NLS API resolver records by repeatedly calling the shared resolver core at 0x1407DB960.
findings.inferred_semantics: Populate or validate delayed function-pointer records for NLS/locale APIs before locale-sensitive helper paths use them.

findings.summary: Shared dynamic API resolver core used by many adjacent resolver-builder functions.
evidence: Direct-call scan found 28 callers of 0x1407DB960, including the 0x1407DC3E8 locale resolver bootstrap.
Function literals include UTF-16 prefixes api-ms- and ext-ms-, indicating API-set/extension DLL name handling.
The resolver accepts selector-like ECX values plus RDX/R8/R9 pointer triples prepared by callers.

findings.summary: Adjacent helper around GetLastError/SetLastError and internal error/reporting calls; retained as context, not yet part of the critical-section pair.
evidence: Function-call artifact resolves 0x140802748 to KERNEL32.dll!GetLastError and 0x140802710 to KERNEL32.dll!SetLastError.
The helper also calls 0x1407DBDAC, 0x1407DBDB4, 0x1407DCBC4, 0x1407DCC3C, 0x1407DB2FC, and fallback/error target 0x1407C45DC.
The 0x1407D3730 leave thunk ends before the later 0x1407D3740 code that calls this helper, so this helper should not be treated as the leave operation itself.

next_worklist: Map 0x1407DB960 deeply enough to name the resolver record layout and output storage fields.
Map callers 0x1407D3610 and 0x1407DA25C to understand the other resolver bootstrap entry points.
Add a reusable Reverser exporter for resolver invocation tables so repeated LEA/MOV/CALL records become structured rows automatically.
